sizing_rule.note: Select system with best risk-adjusted metrics (win%, avg trade, risk/reward, std dev) for reinvestment position sizing. Optimal f derived from comparative system analysis, not fixed percentage. Reinvestment multiplier compounds based on win percentage and trade magnitude relative to volatility.

source_rule_text: Maximize profits under reinvestment trading by selecting the system with the best risk-adjusted performance metrics, not merely by percentage of winning trades alone.
